description: Post-tool quality gates — verify code quality, security, and test coverage after code generation.

hooks.name: remind-run-tests
hooks.description: After any Java source file change, remind to run the test suite including Testcontainers integration tests.
hooks.run: echo '[QUALITY GATE] Run tests: ./gradlew test integrationTest' && exit 0

hooks.name: check-exception-handler-coverage
hooks.description: After adding a new exception class, verify it is mapped in GlobalExceptionHandler.
hooks.run: echo '[QUALITY GATE] Verify the new exception class is mapped in GlobalExceptionHandler with correct HTTP status and code.' && exit 0

hooks.name: security-log-scan
hooks.description: After modifying log-related files or filters, verify sensitive fields are masked.
hooks.run: echo '[QUALITY GATE] Verify sensitive fields (password, token, authorization, creditCard, ssn) are masked in all log statements.' && exit 0

hooks.name: verify-reactive-return-types
hooks.description: After modifying a Service or Controller, confirm return types are Mono/Flux.
hooks.run: echo '[QUALITY GATE] Verify all public methods in Service/Controller return Mono<T> or Flux<T>. No void, Optional, or List return types.' && exit 0

hooks.name: check-dto-validation-annotations
hooks.description: After creating request DTO classes, verify validation annotations are present.
hooks.run: echo '[QUALITY GATE] Verify request DTO has field-level validation annotations (@NotNull, @NotBlank, @Valid, etc.) and is not an exposed entity class.' && exit 0

hooks.name: verify-security-route-updated
hooks.description: After adding a new controller, verify SecurityWebFilterChain is updated with route rules.
hooks.run: echo '[QUALITY GATE] Verify SecurityConfig.SecurityWebFilterChain includes authorization rules for all routes in the new controller.' && exit 0

hooks.name: check-test-coverage
hooks.description: After adding a controller or service, verify corresponding test files exist.
hooks.run: echo '[QUALITY GATE] Verify integration test (IT.java) and unit test (Test.java) exist for the new class. Tests must cover happy-path, 400, 401, 403, 404 scenarios.' && exit 0
